_comment: Algorithm tuning parameters. Changing these alters the pacing/sensitivity of the pedagogy. Values are ported from the SocraticCode (OpenCode) fork; see socratiskill.txt for rationale.
_calibration_comment: Up-leveling thresholds scale with current level: a novice needs more sustained evidence than an advanced user. Down-leveling stays flat (3/5) because being stuck above your level is worse than being stuck below it.
